functions.name: m_demo.test_2.multiply_2_numbers
documentation:
Multiply two numbers

This function only returns the multiplication of two input numbers, which
can be either `int` or `float` types.

Parameters
----------
a : int or float
    First number
b : int or float
    Second number

Returns
-------
int or float
    `a` times `b`

functions.name: m_demo.test.add_2_numbers
documentation:
Add two numbers

This function only returns the addition of two input numbers, which can
be either `int` or `float` types.

Parameters
----------
a : int or float
    First number
b : int or float
    Second number

Returns
-------
int or float
    `a` plus `b`
